_comment: Per-run config at <workdir>/.sophia/config.json (chmod 600, gitignored). REQUIRED from user: user_competency_framework_id (Sophia DevTools -> Network -> `framework/?user_competency_framework_id=XXXX`). AUTO: sophia_user_id (decoded from refresh-token JWT), github_username (gh api user), framework_name/due_date/primary_auditor (from fetched JSON), cycle dates (default 12mo). OPTIONAL: slack_channels, slack_dms, shoutout_urls, teammates, plane_projects (LIST — multi-board is common for people on several projects; each entry {"id": "...", "name": "..."}).
